name: Shrimp Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the green onions to taste (about 1 to 2 tablespoons).
2. In a small mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
3. Gradually add the lemon juice and continue beating.
4. Stir in the chopped cooked shrimp, prepared horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, and garlic powder.
5. Chill the mixture to allow flavors to blend.
6. Garnish as desired.
7. Serve with crackers or fresh vegetables.
8. Refrigerate any leftovers.
